mapper.insert: INSERT INTO `product` ( product_id, name, subtitle, main_image, category, tags, status, price, version, is_deleted, create_time, update_time ) VALUES ( #{productId}, #{name}, #{subtitle}, #{mainImage}, #{category}, #{tags}, #{status}, #{price}, #{version}, #{isDeleted}, COALESCE(#{createTime}, NOW()), COALESCE(#{updateTime}, NOW()) )
mapper.select: SELECT id, product_id, name, subtitle, main_image, category, tags, status, price, version, is_deleted, create_time, update_time FROM `product` WHERE product_id = #{productId} AND is_deleted = 0 LIMIT 1
mapper.update:
UPDATE `product`
name = #{name}, subtitle = #{subtitle}, main_image = #{mainImage}, category = #{category}, tags = #{tags}, status = #{status}, price = #{price}, version = version + 1, update_time = NOW()
WHERE product_id = #{productId} AND is_deleted = 0
UPDATE `product` SET status = #{status}, version = version + 1, update_time = NOW() WHERE product_id = #{productId} AND is_deleted = 0
UPDATE `product` SET is_deleted = 1, version = version + 1, update_time = NOW() WHERE product_id = #{productId} AND is_deleted = 0
